title: stipa atlantica
intro: Stipa atlantica, also known as the Atlantic Bristlegrass, is a species of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Stipa atlantica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive problems, such as diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, are often used to promote digestion, calm the nervous system, and support the immune system.
